name: Kamdhenu Limited
summary: Kamdhenu Limited manufactures, distributes, and markets steel, and paint and allied products under the Kamdhenu brand name in India. It operates through Steel and Paints segments. The company offers thermo-mechanically-treated bars and rebars; and structural steel, such as angles, channels, beam sections, flats, rounds, and squares. It also provides paint products that comprise exterior and interior emulsions, water based primers, wood finishes, aluminum paints, and textured and designer paints. In addition, the company offers roofing and cladding products, and tile profile roofing sheets comprising pre-painted galvanized steel sheets and pre-painted Alu-Zinc steel sheets; and accessories and rain water systems, such as arch/curved profiles, SDF screws, and fiber sheets, as well as pre-engineered buildings. It offers its products through a network of dealers and distributors. The company was formerly known as Kamdhenu Ispat Limited and changed its name to Kamdhenu Limited in January 2016. Kamdhenu Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Gurugram, India.
